name: lifecycle-runtime-view-activity-redesign
title: Lifecycle Runtime 观察视图基于 Activity 模型重设计
description: 前端 lifecycle-session-view 基于 ActivityLifecycleRunState 重设计：① 顶部 DAG 缩略图 + active activity 高亮；② Activity 卡片按 executor.kind 切换渲染（Agent → SessionList；Function → input/output JSON + run_id；Human → 按 form_schema 渲染决策表单，接入完整 decision value 集合）；③ Attempt 切换器（iteration_policy.max_attempts > 1 时折叠/展开）；④ Claiming 暂态独立可见；⑤ Artifact 流面板升级为按 transition 串联的 input→output 流图。依赖 lifecycle-step-fallback-cleanup 先落地。
creator: claude-agent
